---
class-title: "Surface Water Drinking Water"
class-subtitle: "A data management (Sata) and document scraping exercises."
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-icons/1.10.5/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_classplan_style.css">

<div class="container">
    <!-- Header Section -->
    <header class="class-plan-header">
        <p class="tagline">Class Plan</p>
        <h2>{{< meta class-title >}}</h2>
        <p class="subtitle">{{< meta class-subtitle >}}</p>
    </header>

    <!-- Curriculum Modules Section -->
    <div class="modules-section">
        <h3 class="section-heading">Curriculum Modules</h3>
        <div class="modules-grid">

            <!-- Module 1 -->
            <div class="card">
                <a href="../../module/module_workshop/ku_Jacobs_data_management_stata.html" class="module-card-title">
                    Data Management in Stata
                </a>
                <ul class="details-list">
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-person-fill icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Author:</strong> Benjamin Jacobs</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-pc-display icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Tool:</strong> Stata</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-person-workspace icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Audience:</strong> Undergraduate (Introductory)</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-clock-fill icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Estimated Time:</strong> 1-hour class session</div>
                    </li>
                </ul>
                <p class="module-description">Walks students through data management techniques in a research environment, covering best practices for downloading, transforming, merging, and saving data.</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Module 2 -->
            <div class="card">
                <a href="../../module/module_workshop/ku_Bodenheimer_Word_Scrape_Workshop.html" class="module-card-title">
                    Word Document Scraping Workshop
                </a>
                <ul class="details-list">
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-person-fill icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Author:</strong> Joseph Bodenheimer</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-pc-display icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Tool:</strong> Python</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-person-workspace icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Audience:</strong> Undergraduate (Introductory)</div>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <i class="bi bi-clock-fill icon"></i>
                        <div><strong>Estimated Time:</strong> 1-hour class session</div>
                    </li>
                </ul>
                <p class="module-description">Builds a Python workflow to scrape public data from KDHE Consumer Confidence Report .docx files, using python-docx, regular expressions, and pandas to extract fields across many reports.</p>
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Related Resources -->
    <div class="card">
        <h3 class="card-title">Related Resources</h3>
        <div class="resource-buttons-horizontal">
            <a href="../projects/project_SurfaceWaterDrinkingWater.html" class="btn btn-project">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill icon"></i> View Project Page
            </a>
            <a href="../datasets/data_SurfaceWaterDrinkingWater.html" class="btn btn-dataset">
               <i class="bi bi-clipboard-data-fill icon"></i> Explore the Dataset
            </a>
        </div>
    </div>

</div>
```
